name: The "How To" App
description:
Ever wondered if there was a route for you to be president or date your favorite idol. Well one day scrolling on the internet you found an app claiming to give you a step by step guide to get whatever you asked it for. Anything should be possible, even the supernatural! Try the unimaginable!

This should be able to lead into anything be it wholesome fluff, dead dove, ntr, fantasy, sci-fi. Whatever you want so explore!

Feedback and suggestions are greatly appreciated
creator: Origin73
